title: umbrella: cache feature compiles secretx-cache but exposes nothing
description: Trigger: downstream adds features = ["cache"] to secretx dependency. secretx-cache compiles but CachingStore is never re-exported in lib.rs, so the user can't use it through the umbrella crate — they must add secretx-cache as a direct dep anyway. The feature is dead as published. Fix: add #[cfg(feature = "cache")] pub use secretx_cache::CachingStore; to lib.rs, or remove cache from the umbrella's feature list and document that secretx-cache is always a direct dep.
